dataList.name: Causality that Threads the Past, the Present, и the Future [三世因果]
dataList.desc: При 10+ Clashes against the same target, randomly получает orтеряет Сила клеша by (количество клешей / 10) in a Clash (округляется вниз) Начало битвы: - Begin Encounter with the same ХП as Butterfly[TabExplain] of Entangled Lives::The Pupa (excluding Shield) - Получает 10 Stacks each of [StackPastActivate] / [StackPresentActivate] / [StackFutureActivate] при менее чем 66%/33% ХП, получает new Slot patterns - When this unit's ХП drops below 66%/33% for the first time в этой битве, получает 10 Stacks each of [StackPastActivate], [StackPresentActivate], и [StackFutureActivate] на следующий ход

dataList.name: Moment of Entangled Lives
dataList.desc: Начало хода: Activate the highest-Stacked state of time between [StackPastActivate], [StackPresentActivate], и [StackFutureActivate] и use a special Skill - Если multiple states of time share the highest стаков, the currently active state of time does not change - Inactive states of time become [StackPast], [StackPresent], или [StackFuture], respectively - When the currently active state of time changes, получает 1 [TimeGap] Every time Illusory Butterfly[TabExplain] of Entangled Lives::The Past / The Present / The Future are hit as main targets, Butterfly[TabExplain] of Entangled Lives::Imago loses [StackPastActivate] / [StackPresentActivate] / [StackFutureActivate] стаков Higher [StackPastActivate] / [StackPresentActivate] / [StackFutureActivate] Stacks lead to Butterfly[TabExplain] of Entangled Lives::Imago's Skill Power и урона output becoming greatly enhanced, и greatly increase the amount of status effects it inflicts или gains

dataList.name: Life Hanging on a Wedge [一櫼之命]
dataList.desc:
Начало битвы: Получает 3 [YesdragonSelfRefraction]
Конец хода: Получает 1 [YesdragonSelfRefraction] на следующий ход
Получает +1 more [YesdragonSelfRefraction] from this effect every time the "Thundering Wrath" Passive triggers

dataList.name: Thundering Wrath [震怒]
dataList.desc:
The Inverted Scale Part takes урона only от скиллов that it is the main target of; does not получает урона from any other sources
When the Inverted Scale Part is hit, remove the Inverted Scale Part from the Skill Slots на следующий ход; получает 1 [AttackUp] и 1 [DefenseDown] за каждые [YesdragonSelfRefraction] стаков consumed by the "Wrath of the Inverted Scale" Skill

dataList.name: Dragon's Scale
dataList.desc:
Unaffected by [Agility] и [Binding]
Получает -50% ХП урона from [Combustion], [Laceration:*Кетчупа*], [Vibration], [Burst:*Зелёнки*] , и [Sinking:*Депрессии*] ; -50% to Stagger Threshold raised by [Vibration]

dataList.name: The Unreachable Heavens
dataList.desc:
Начало битвы: The Head Part gains Shield равный 100% of this unit's макс. ХП
Does notтеряет Shield в конце хода
When the Shield is broken, enter a new phase

dataList.name: Tarnished Body
dataList.desc:
All Parts become Breakable и Unseverable
Broken Parts regenerate in 3 turns with 30% ХП

dataList.name: Life Hanging on a Wedge [一櫼之命]
dataList.desc: Cannot be killed as long as the Flower-burying Wedge Part isn't broken

dataList.name: Broken Scale
dataList.desc:
When the Inverted Scale Part is broken, the "Thundering Wrath" Passive does not activate
While the Inverted Scale Part is broken, all Parts получает 3 [AttackUp] и 6 [DefenseDown]

dataList.name: Broken Skull
dataList.desc: While the Head part is broken, all Parts получает 2 [Vulnerable] every turn

dataList.name: Erumpent Flower-burying Efflorescence [梅花滿開]
dataList.desc:

Конец хода: Получает 1 [YesdragonSelfRefraction] на следующий ход
Получает +1 more [YesdragonSelfRefraction] from this effect every time the "Thundering Wrath" Passive triggers
- When the Inverted Scale is broken, reset the increased [YesdragonSelfRefraction] получает

dataList.desc:

When the Inverted Scale Part is hit, remove the Inverted Scale Part from the Skill Slots на следующий ход; получает 1 [AttackUp] и 1 [DefenseDown] за каждые [YesdragonSelfRefraction] стаков consumed by the "Wrath of the Inverted Scale" Skill

dataList.name: Dragon's Vein [龍脈]
dataList.desc:
Начало хода: Получает Shield равный 300% of the Core's макс. ХП
- This effect does not trigger when Attack Skills are equipped
Начало хода: When Staggered, выходит из стаггера

dataList.name: The Dragon's Bleeding Vein
dataList.desc:
при получении удара, накладывает [YesdragonPower] on the attacker на следующий ход

On death, immediately накладывает [YesdragonPower] on all Sinners

dataList.name: One Last Radiance [回光返照]
dataList.desc:
When this unit takes урона that brings its ХП down to 0, this unit's ХП does not drop below 1 for the turn; выходит из стаггера due to урона
For the rest of the turn, this unit cannot be Staggered или killed due to урона; then, use "Impale the Self, Impurity[TabExplain] to Purge" при the very end of that turn

dataList.name: Lofty Energy
dataList.desc:
This unit cannot be subject to healing или Assist Defense[TabExplain] effects
Получает урона only от скиллов that this unit is the main target of; does not получает урона from any other sources

dataList.name: Refracted Egress
dataList.desc: Cannot Retreat

dataList.name: Return to Origin [物歸原主]
dataList.desc: при получении удара by Yinglong's "Levinfall" Skill, die instantly и накладывает 1 [YesdragonSelfRefraction] on Yinglong

dataList.name: Rien, The Index Nursefather
dataList.desc: Получает -50% урона from Unopposed Attacks Получает -50% урона from [Combustion], [Laceration:*Кетчупа*], [Vibration], [Burst:*Зелёнки*] , и [Sinking:*Депрессии*] When healing IQ from [UnlockBuff_Base], если this unit's IQ is below 15, хилит IQ up to 15 Начало битвы: Получает [BurningWoundRien_Mask] и хилит IQ up to 45 При 55%- ХП, end the turn и получает a new pattern - Remove all effects other than those exclusive этому юниту - Change [StackRienSpecialSkill] стаков to 0
dataList.flavor:
I waited for "the moment" as the Prescript told me to.
Even after my darling daughter left, I waited.

And after a while, I was contacted by Limbus Company, и saw that the Backdoor was open.
That's when the device beeped и let me know that it was finally time to bring my daughter home.

dataList.name: Oracle Device [Caduceus]
dataList.desc: A random weapon is assigned to every Coin. Each weapon has a unique effect. - [RienWeapon01Hatchet] - [RienWeapon02Stiletto] - [RienWeapon03Greatsword] - [RienWeapon04Rapier] - [RienWeapon05Sledgehammer] - [RienWeapon06Ultragreatsword] - [RienWeapon07Lance] - [RienWeapon08Chain] - [RienWeapon09Scythe] When using an Attack Skill, получает 1 [StackRienSpecialSkill] (макс. 9) - Can be gained once per Skill; does not получает стаков from the same Skill twice Начало хода: При 9 [StackRienSpecialSkill] Stacks, use a powerful Skill - Attack End: After using the powerful Skill for the first time, получает [Shin_Rien] - Reset the per-Skill [StackRienSpecialSkill] cap - Min & макс. Speed +15 - Конец хода: Получает 1 [Vulnerable] и 2 [ResultReduction] на следующий ход Turn 4 Start after entering the field: при менее чем 9 [StackRienSpecialSkill], bring its стаков to 9; then, получает (стаков gained x 3) [KarmaOfIndexRien] - Then, activate this effect every 4 turns
dataList.flavor:
A vial of what looks like liquid metal capable of changing its shape и mass, its qualities almost like those of Singularities, swishes inside the Device.
The form the fluid takes is contingent on the Prescript the Device receives. The weapons it produces depend on the information regarding the target и the time limit given to carry out the assassination.
One day, as he received a dagger too small for the task, he elected to wait until it produced a different weapon. However, despite the approaching deadline, it refused to provide him a proper weapon; he had no choice but to kill his target with a fork.

dataList.name: Will of the Prescript
dataList.desc: Начало хода: - Получает [IndexPrescript_Base_2nd] based on [UnlockBuff_Base] стадии на себе - Накладывает [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality] against a random Sinner, и prioritize attacking them - When using a Skill against [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality], convert all Coins on that Skill to [SuperCoin:*Вечные монеты*] When attacking, если [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality] is killed, или если this unit can no longer attack that target, use the remaining Skills against a random Sinner - Prioritizes targets with the lowest current ХП, unless they have 1 ХП - When the randomly chosen Sinner is killed, или если the said Sinner's ХП is brought down to 1, repeat this effect on another Sinner Наносит +2.5% урона against [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality] за каждые [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] (макс. 20%) - При 9 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy], наносит +30% урона against all targets
dataList.flavor:
Do you wish me to raise a family?

"It must've been fate that brought us together. To think that I'd ever meet a husband like you..."

dataList.name: Undertake Prescript
dataList.desc: Конец хода: Если [IndexPrescript_Base_2nd] was executed this turn, хилит 10 IQ и получает 3 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] (один раз за ход) Конец хода: Если [IndexPrescript_Base_2nd] was not executed this turn, получает 8 [KarmaOfIndexRien] - Если this unit does not have [UnlockBuff_Base], получает 1 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] в конце хода - При 9 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy], does not получает [KarmaOfIndexRien]
dataList.flavor:
Do you wish me toтеряет my family?

"Honey, I gotta получает a quick trip up north today."
"Ah, also—hey, buddy. I'm expecting a package this afternoon, so would you be a dear и pick it up for me, sweetheart?"

dataList.name: Unlock
dataList.desc:
Конец хода: При 3/6/9 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] или при 95%-/85%-/75%- ХП,- Получает [UnlockBuff_Rien1]/[UnlockBuff_Rien2]/[UnlockBuff_Rien3]

Turn 1 End after entering the field: При lower than [UnlockBuff_Base] стадии 1, получает [UnlockBuff_Rien1]
Turn 3 End after entering the field: При lower than [UnlockBuff_Base] стадии 2, получает [UnlockBuff_Rien2]

When [UnlockBuff_Base] is activated due to ХП или Turn conditionals:
- при менее чем 3/6/9 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] стаков, raise them to 3/6/9
Получает 5 [KarmaOfIndexRien] при the на следующий ход Start за каждые стаков gained
dataList.flavor: "Following the Prescripts is to unlock what is locked."

dataList.name: Fixed Panic
dataList.desc:
Накладывает the [PanicChangeLock] effect
Конец хода: Если this unit is in Panic, raise IQ to 15

dataList.name: Rien, the Father [Imitation]
dataList.desc: Получает -75% урона from Unopposed Attacks Получает -75% урона from [Combustion], [Laceration:*Кетчупа*], [Vibration], [Burst:*Зелёнки*] , и [Sinking:*Депрессии*] When healing IQ from [UnlockBuff_Base], если this unit's IQ is below 30, хилит up to 30 IQ When this unit enters a new phase при 55% ХП, получает the following effects: - Remove all effects other than those exclusive этому юниту - Reset [StackRienSpecialSkill] стаков to 0 - Получает [IndexPrescript_RienSecondPhase] - Convert [BurningWoundRien_Mask] to [BurningWoundRien] - Convert [KarmaOfIndexRien] to [KarmaOfIndexRien_2Phase]; then получает 10 Stacks of that effect - Если this unit does not have [Shin_Rien], immediately получает that effect При 25% или lower ХП, получает a new pattern и greatly enhance a certain Skill
dataList.flavor:
Once, he harbored a suspicion that he was being shaped в an imitation of someone; he doubted the Will и nearly defied it, for he did not know whom he was to mimic. Only when it was too late did he understand its intent и come to accept the Prescript's will.
Only then was the false father completed.

dataList.name: Oracle Device [Caduceus] - Full Unlock
dataList.desc: A random weapon is assigned to every Coin. Each weapon has a unique effect. - [RienWeapon01Hatchet2phase] - [RienWeapon02Stiletto2phase] - [RienWeapon03Greatsword2phase] - [RienWeapon04Rapier2phase] - [RienWeapon05Sledgehammer2phase] - [RienWeapon06Ultragreatsword2phase] - [RienWeapon07Lance2phase] - [RienWeapon08Chain2phase] - [RienWeapon09Scythe2phase] When using an Attack Skill, получает 1 [StackRienSpecialSkill] (макс. 9) - Can be gained once per Skill; does not получает стаков from the same Skill twice - Does not получает стаков from a Skill used only in a special pattern Начало хода: При 9 [StackRienSpecialSkill] Stacks, use a powerful Skill - Reset the per-Skill [StackRienSpecialSkill] cap - Min & макс. Speed +15 - Конец хода: Получает 2 [Vulnerable] и 3 [ResultReduction] на следующий ход Activate the following, starting from the turn in which the phase changed - Every 3 turns, при менее чем 9 [StackRienSpecialSkill], bring its стаков to 9; then, получает (стаков gained x 5) [KarmaOfIndexRien_2Phase]
dataList.flavor: An unparalleled weapon и a curse bestowed by Hermes, a god of the City whose Prescripts are distributed by radio waves.

dataList.name: Will of the Prescript
dataList.desc: Начало хода: - Накладывает [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality] against a random Sinner, и prioritize attacking them - When using a Skill against [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality], convert all Coins on that Skill to [SuperCoin:*Вечные монеты*] - Получает [Protection] равный [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] (макс. 9) - Теряет 1 стак за каждые 20 [KarmaOfIndexRien_2Phase] When attacking, если [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality] is killed, или если this unit can no longer attack that target, use the remaining Skills against a random other Sinner - Prioritizes targets with the lowest current ХП, unless they have 1 ХП - When the randomly chosen Sinner is killed, или если the said Sinner's ХП is brought down to 1, repeat this effect on another Sinner Наносит +5% урона against [IndexPrescriptTargetToPersonality] за каждые [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] (макс. 40%) - При 9 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy], наносит +50% урона against all targets Starting from the first turn after the phase change, активирует следующие эффекты: - Начало хода: Получает [BlackNightmare] · Если this unit used a powerful attack в прошлом ходу, теряет [BlackNightmare] for that turn
dataList.flavor:
I raised a family.

"You're not supposed to be here right now."
"My work is still much underway, и I'd like to carve them up in peace so they can attain the most exquisite beauty I can sculpt."
"... Don't tell me, are you here to defy the Prescript?"

dataList.name: Undertake Prescript
dataList.desc: Конец хода: Если [IndexPrescript_Base_2nd] was executed this turn, хилит 15 IQ и получает 1 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] (один раз за ход) Конец хода: Если [IndexPrescript_Base_2nd] was not executed this turn, получает 8 [KarmaOfIndexRien_2Phase] итеряет 1 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] - Если this unit used a powerful Skill this turn, получает 12 [KarmaOfIndexRien_2Phase] итеряет 2 [BlessingOfIndexPrescriptEnemy] вместо этого
dataList.flavor:
I... lost my family.

"Don't go..."
"Don't go... Not... like this... Daddy... Please... help us..."

dataList.name: Fixed Panic
dataList.desc:
Накладывает the [PanicChangeLock] effect
Конец хода: Если this unit is in Panic, raise IQ to 30

dataList.name: Fixed Panic
dataList.desc:
Накладывает the [PanicChangeLock] effect
Конец хода: Если this unit is in Panic, raise IQ to 45

dataList.name: Let's Play Tag! Here I Go!
dataList.desc: Начало хода: Если there are no [TagGameBuff]s, this unit's 1/2/3 other allies that have the lowest Уровень become [TagGameBuff] for 3 turns (number of units receiving this effect increases every time this effect activates) Если [TagGameBuff] effect expires while the unit that had the [TagGameBuff] effect is alive, получает the following effects: - All Sinners получает fixed урон равный 40% ХП each - Reduce IQ to -45 for a random Sinner who can enter Э.Г.О Corrosion[TabExplain] или Panic Если a Sinner kills a [TagGameBuff], the said Sinner gains 1 [ResultEnhancement] до конца битвы (this effect can be gained cumulatively)

dataList.name: Will You Play? Will You Play? Will You Play?
dataList.desc: Конец хода: Если this unit is the only surviving ally, или если the Core is при 50%- ХП, use "Let's Play Together Forever~!" на следующий ход (один раз за бой)

dataList.name: No More Playtime
dataList.desc: Начало хода: The "Stuffed Toy" Part gains [Protection] равное number of allies excluding this unit When the "Stuffed Toy" Part is destroyed, Will You Play? и its remaining allies are killed

dataList.name: Attachment Plushie
dataList.desc: ХП урона taken by the Core is fixed при 0

dataList.name: All of My Corpus has been Given to Tibia
dataList.desc:
Получает -30% ХП, IQ урона from [Combustion], [Vibration], [Burst:*Зелёнки*] , и [Sinking:*Депрессии*] 
Получает -50% урона from [Laceration:*Кетчупа*]

Начало хода: Если this unit is Staggered, выходит из стаггера. Afterward, получает 2 [CrimsonTakeDamageUp] и becomes unable to use "Installation Art no. 3: Improvised Ribcage" until на следующий ход (один раз за бой)

Конец хода: Получает 1 [DefenseDown] на следующий ход за каждые 4 [Combustion] на себе (макс. 15)

dataList.name: Observation
dataList.desc:
Начало битвы: Накладывает 1 [ObservedPerson] on all enemies; then, получает  [Breath:*Кумара*] Potency и Count равное number of units with [ObservedPerson]

Начало хода: Накладывает 1 [ObservedPerson] against targets without [ObservedPerson]

за каждые 10 [ObservedPerson] on the target, наносит +1 more [Vibration] Potency и Count with this unit's Skills (макс. 3)

dataList.name: Adaptation
dataList.desc: Получает 1 [Breath:*Кумара*] Potency every time this unit inflicts урона with Attack Skill effects (15 per turn) - Если the target has 15+ [ObservedPerson], получает 1 дополнительный [Breath:*Кумара*] Potency with every hit Получает +1 счётчик [Breath:*Кумара*] every time this unit takes урона from a Sinner's Attack Skill effects (15 per turn) - Если the target has 15+ [ObservedPerson],получает +1 дополнительный счётчика [Breath:*Кумара*] with every hit taken Начало хода: Наносит 3 [ResultReduction] и 5 [ObservedPerson] to the Sinner who dealt the most урона этому юниту в прошлом ходу - Если the target has 30 [ObservedPerson], наносит 5 [ResultReduction] вместо этого

dataList.name: Defense Mechanism
dataList.desc: Начало хода: Получает Shield равный 30% недостающего ХП (Shield ХП cannot exceed 25% of the макс. ХП) - Если у этого юнита есть [Combustion], теряет (счётчика [Combustion] x 1.5)% Shield ХП - Shield takes +100% урона from [Burst:*Зелёнки*] effects Конец хода: Если the Shield gained due to this effect is destroyed, до конца битвы, получает 1 [DefenseDown] при Turn Start за каждые instance the Shield has been destroyed (макс. 5)

dataList.name: Confirmation Bias
dataList.desc: Конец хода: Siphon 10 IQ from Sinners (макс. 3 Sinners in descending order of IQ; does not накладывает cumulatively on the same target) (Does not activate если Hohenheim is Panicked) IQ этого юнита не падает ниже 15

dataList.name: Establish Hypothesis
dataList.desc:
On Turn 3: Gains a new pattern и prepares to use a powerful Skill.
After Turn 3 is over: The above effect activates when this unit has 30+ счётчика  [Breath:*Кумара*] в конце хода

Если this unit did not получает any ХП урона during the preparation period before using the powerful Skill, greatly enhance the Skill (does not count damages taken by Shield ХП)

dataList.name: Maladaptation
dataList.desc:
When weakened due to a Choice Event, this Passive replaces 「Adaptation」

Получает 1  [Breath:*Кумара*] Potency every time this unit inflicts урона with Attack Skill effects (15 per turn)
- Если the target has 15+ [ObservedPerson], получает 1 дополнительный  [Breath:*Кумара*] Potency with every hit; however, reduce the target's [ObservedPerson] by 3

Получает +1 счётчик  [Breath:*Кумара*] every time this unit takes урона from a Sinner's Attack Skill effects (15 per turn)
- Если the target has 15+ [ObservedPerson],получает +1 дополнительный счётчика  [Breath:*Кумара*] with every hit taken; however, reduce the target's [ObservedPerson] by 3

Critical урона does not increase или decrease

dataList.name: Inadequate Defense Mechanism
dataList.desc:
When weakened due to a Choice Event, this Passive replaces 「Defense Mechanism」

Начало хода: Получает Shield равный 15% недостающего ХП (Shield ХП cannot exceed 5% of the макс. ХП)
- Если у этого юнита есть [Combustion], теряет (счётчика [Combustion] x 2)% Shield ХП
- Shield takes +150% урона from [Burst:*Зелёнки*]  effects

Конец хода: Если the Shield gained due to this effect is destroyed, до конца битвы, получает 2 [DefenseDown] при Turn Start за каждые instance the Shield has been destroyed (макс. 10)

dataList.name: Self-doubt
dataList.desc: When weakened due to a Choice Event, this Passive replaces 「Confirmation Bias」 Начало хода: Получает 3 [Vulnerable] итеряет 15 IQ Конец хода: Siphon 5 IQ from targets with higher IQ than this unit (макс. 3 targets; in descending order of IQ; cannot stack on the same target) (Does not activate если Hohenheim is Panicked)

dataList.name: Adaptation
dataList.desc: Получает 1 [Breath:*Кумара*] Potency every time this unit inflicts урона with Attack Skill effects (15 per turn) - Если the target has 15+ [ObservedPerson], получает 1 дополнительный [Breath:*Кумара*] Potency with every hit Получает +1 счётчик [Breath:*Кумара*] every time this unit takes урона from a Sinner's Attack Skill effects (15 per turn) - Если the target has 15+ [ObservedPerson],получает +1 дополнительный счётчика [Breath:*Кумара*] with every hit taken Начало хода: Наносит 3 [ResultReduction] и 5 [ObservedPerson] to the Sinner who dealt the most урона этому юниту в прошлом ходу - Если the target has 30 [ObservedPerson], наносит 5 [ResultReduction] вместо этого

dataList.name: Superposed Afterimage
dataList.desc: Upon entering the Encounter, this unit gains [TimeEntangleFour] Если this unit does not have [TimeGapAb], this unit gains [TimeGapAb] равный ([TimeEntangleDesc] стадии x 400) (once per [TimeEntangleDesc] стадии) При стадии 3 и 4 [TimeEntangleDesc], если this unit loses all [TimeGapAb], the pattern changes и become Staggered for the на следующий ход При стадии 2 [TimeEntangleDesc], если this unit loses all [TimeGapAb], the pattern changes Получает -30% ХП, IQ урона from [Combustion], [Laceration:*Кетчупа*], [Burst:*Зелёнки*] , и [Sinking:*Депрессии*] ; -30% to Stagger Threshold raised by [Vibration]

dataList.name: The Past - Segmentation [分節]
dataList.desc: Displays current [StackPastActivate] стаков on Butterfly[TabExplain] of Entangled Lives::Imago Every time this unit is hit as the main target: - Butterfly[TabExplain] of Entangled Lives::Imago loses 1 [StackPastActivate] стаков (once per Coin) - The Sinner who attacked this unit heals 10 IQ (один раз за ход per Sinner) Если this unit did not get hit as the main target this turn, Butterfly[TabExplain] of Entangled Lives::Imago gains 5 [StackPastActivate] стаков при Combat End - Если Butterfly[TabExplain] of Entangled Lives::Imago is Staggered, this effect does not activate

dataList.name: The Past - Origination [緣起]
dataList.desc:
Fix this unit's Speed to 1; this unit's ХП does not drop below 1

When this unit takes ХП урона, transfer half of урона taken to Butterfly[TabExplain] of Entangled Lives::Imago (округляется вниз)
